hooks.command: filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$filepath" == *.env* || "$filepath" == *package-lock.json ]]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Protected file — do not edit .env or lock files directly"}'; fi
filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$filepath" == *.ts || "$filepath" == *.tsx || "$filepath" == *.scss ]]; then cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
filepath=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$filepath" == */api/*.py || "$filepath" == */tests/*.py ]]; then cd api && python -m pytest tests/ -q 2>&1 | tail -15; fi
notify-send -u normal 'Claude Code' 'Permission requested — check terminal'
notify-send -u low 'Claude Code' 'Waiting for your input'
